creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #6)
I installed from repository:
$ pkg info --dependencies gcolor2-0.4_11
gcolor2-0.4_11:
        pango-1.52.2_1
        gtk2-2.24.33_1
        fontconfig-2.15.0_2,1
        harfbuzz-9.0.0
        freetype2-2.13.2
        gdk-pixbuf2-2.42.10_3
        cairo-1.17.4_2,3
        glib-2.80.3,2
        gettext-runtime-0.22.5
        at-spi2-core-2.52.0

You can find all dependencies.
